implementation_summary.summary: CP00-640 covers RP20 Data Room And VDR P08 Hermes evidence continuation over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, type/shape tail, primary implementation, and secondary workflow head evidence boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-640 RP20.P08.M02.S17-RP20.P08.M04.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
